candidates.why: Separate operating D&A summary line, but it appears in the operating expense section alongside SG&A-type expenses rather than as a COGS-specific line. No explicit COGS/COR D&A row is shown, so adding it to the selected parent row 'Cost of goods sold' would risk misallocation/double counting.
Component of the separate D&A summary row. For COGS_DA there is no indication this component belongs specifically to COGS, and the summary row should be preferred over components anyway.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Property, Plant and Equipment
candidates.why: Component of the separate D&A summary row, with no COGS-specific labeling. Not appropriate to add to COGS separately from the selected 'Cost of goods sold' row.

variables.notes: No explicit depreciation/amortisation row tied to cost of goods sold / cost of revenues appears before the financial section. The visible D&A rows are presented as separate operating-expense lines, not as COGS-specific items, so none should be added separately to the selected COGS bucket.

candidates.why: Explicit separate operating D&A summary row shown at the same level as the selected SG&A-related rows and outside the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS bucket ('Sales and Distribution Expenses', 'Salaries and other personnel expenses', 'Other Operating Expense'). It therefore should be added separately later. Summary row preferred over components to avoid double counting.
Component of the separate D&A summary row. Do not choose if the summary row is selected.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Property, Plant and Equipment
candidates.why: Component of the separate D&A summary row. Do not choose if the summary row is selected.

variables.notes: The earlier XSGA mapping intentionally avoided the parent row 'Operating Expense' because it clearly includes depreciation/amortization. Since 'Depreciation and amortization' appears as its own separate operating line outside the selected XSGA component rows, it should be added separately. Component rows are excluded because the summary row is available.
